name: reearth-buildings
description: On-demand 3D Tiles for buildings.reearth.land (TS host + Rust→WASM hot path)

scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir dist
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm run build:wasm && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm run build:wasm && wrangler deploy --env prod
